calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jan-26-2026 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-27-2025 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Dec-16-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Anne Asis for Exchange Bank, Petitioner (via Zoom).

Ms. Asis confirmed that a supplement was filed addressing the examiner's notes, including resolving the publication issue. The court waived publication of notice and found petitioner's declaration of due diligence satisfactory. The court inquired if there were any objections to admitting the will. No objections were raised.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated December 1, 2020 is admitted to probate. Exchange Bank is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with will annexed with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for January 26, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Nov-20-2024 Continued To Dec-16-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
